title: Illusionist / 幻术师
description:
A mirror-and-illusion character for Slay the Spire 2.

"Copy" summons mirror images that replay the first card you play each turn and shatter when you take unblocked damage — a fragile, fast-snowballing engine. Includes ~30 themed cards, custom relics and potions, a starter relic, and Orobas (Ancient) relic/card upgrades.

Fully localized in English and 简体中文 (Simplified Chinese).

Reskins the Necrobinder slot.
changeNote: v0.1.2 — Fix: the Darv (Hoarder) Act-2 ancient event no longer freezes the game. New Darv ancient card: Phantasm Storm. Reworked Sabotage: deal 16 damage, apply 2 Weak, First Move puts it back on top of your draw pile (upgraded 22/3). Also includes earlier balance (starter Defend 5->4, Disrupt applies Weak) and the fix removing base Necrobinder potions from reward pools.
